children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Validate and parse the command string to determine the operation type.
children.behavior: Check that command is one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'. If invalid, return error.

acceptance_criteria.description: Valid command returns parsed_command and error=None

children.stop_reason: Pure validation function, no side effects

children.name: PlaceOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'place' command: validate items, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order, send notification.
children.behavior: Sequentially call child functions for each step; if any fails, rollback previous steps.

data_operations.description: Read product stock, decrement available, increment reserved

constraints.description: All items must have sufficient stock before reservation
Payment must be processed before inventory reservation

acceptance_criteria.description: On failure, all changes rolled back

children.stop_reason: Complex multi-step operation requiring further decomposition

children.name: CancelOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'cancel' command: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update status.
children.behavior: Sequentially call child functions; rollback on failure.

global_vars.description: Read order status, write cancelled status
Read reserved count, write restored stock
Read payment record, write refund status

data_operations.description: Read order to verify not shipped, update status to cancelled
Read reserved items, restore stock count
Read payment details, update status to refunded

constraints.description: Order must exist and not be in 'shipped' status
Refund must be processed before inventory restoration

children.stop_reason: Complex multi-step operation requiring further decomposition

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'track' command: retrieve order status and estimated delivery time.
children.behavior: Query orders database for order_id, return status and delivery estimate.

global_vars.description: Read order status and delivery info

data_operations.description: Retrieve order status and estimated delivery time

constraints.description: Order must exist in the database

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns estimated delivery time if available
Returns error if order not found

children.stop_reason: Simple query but may involve multiple data sources

governance_notes: Parent global state conservation verified: orders (read_write) covered by CancelOrder (read_write) and TrackOrder (read) and PlaceOrder (write); inventory (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (read_write) and CancelOrder (read_write); payments (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (write) and CancelOrder (read_write). All parent required operations are satisfied across children.
